case_title: GRANT & WEBER, A CORPORATION VS. PAVEL BEJANSKI et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANT & WEBER, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BEJANSKI, PAVEL DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2012
